data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of sending an SMS/email blast with the message '50% off tomorrow 2pm - first to book!'. However, the evidence provided does not include any confirmation that this specific message was sent or that the system is capable of sending such notifications. The linked use case mentions the need for an SMS/email blast, but there is no evidence of this functionality being tested or confirmed, indicating a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of sending the SMS/email blast with the specified message.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence of SMS/email blast functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the system sends the correct SMS/email blast with the specified message.
